scope: Create ExtractionLogs collection for storing LLM extraction attempts
Build custom React component in Payload Admin UI for document upload and preview
Integrate vision-capable LLM (OpenAI GPT-4o or Anthropic Claude) for extraction
Implement preview/edit flow before exercise creation
Ensure frontend validation works for generated exercises
Store extraction logs with raw response, parsed JSON, status, lesson ID, media ID
assumptions: Exercises collection schema exists and can be inspected during architect stage
LLM API credentials (OpenAI or Anthropic) are available in environment
Payload Admin UI can be extended with custom components in Lesson edit view
Frontend exercise validation logic exists and can be reused
review_questions: Which LLM provider should be used - OpenAI GPT-4o or Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet?
Is the Exercises collection schema stable and documented for mapping?
What is the existing pattern for custom admin components in this codebase?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 16 points (new collection + admin component + LLM integration + frontend validation across 3+ modules). Risk: 12 points (API integration, database schema, admin UI). Novelty: 12 points (new feature with some existing patterns). Cross-Domain: 10 points (backend + frontend + admin UI). Ambiguity: 3 points (clear intent with some implementation details to figure out). Dependency: 5 points (depends on LLM APIs, existing Exercises collection). Total: 58 - Very Complex tier.

input_quality.reasoning: Task contains detailed ## Objective, Technical Context, Implementation Requirements, and Definition of Done sections. Has clear acceptance criteria and out-of-scope items. Promoted spec.md with extracted requirements and acceptance criteria.
